digest.component_or_area: rebar fsck snapshot reconciliation on the shared ticket store
propositions: 13 ORPHAN_EVENT faults are benign snapshot-staleness caused by a compaction-vs-reconciler write race where a snapshot omits an EDIT later re-emitted identically by the reconciler.
4 MISSING_CREATE faults are local-only phantom directories with no tracked files; three are empty residue and one (110e) holds an epic duplicating tracked epic 6d0d.
Auto-repair is unsafe: --repair-snapshots corrupts statuses by rebuilding from the full log and --repair only routes EDIT orphans to human triage.
Disposition retires each orphan EDIT file (.json -> .json.retired, skipped by is_active_event()) losslessly and deletes the 4 phantom dirs without changing any ticket status or assignee.
After remediation rebar fsck reports zero ORPHAN_EVENT and zero MISSING_CREATE, and before/after status/assignee of all 13 orphan tickets is identical.
The recurring compaction-vs-reconciler race root cause is out of scope and deferred to separate durable-fix follow-up work.
